summary: The diff addresses REQ-1 by fixing the useSubmitContactForm mutation in useQueries.ts (enum mapping, BigInt conversion), updating the backend to persist submissions correctly (migration + renamed stable variable), and documenting that ContactSection.tsx handles success messages. However, the diff does not show explicit changes to ContactSection.tsx to display a success message instead of an error alert, and inline validation error display in ContactSection.tsx cannot be verified from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: A success message is displayed after a successful form submission (instead of an error alert) in ContactSection.tsx
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not include any changes to ContactSection.tsx. The frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions ContactSection.tsx has validation and error logging but does not confirm a success message was added or that the error alert path was removed. The fix to useQueries.ts alone does not satisfy the UI-level acceptance criterion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Form validation errors are shown inline and do not trigger the submission error path
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to ContactSection.tsx are present in the diff, so it cannot be confirmed that inline validation errors were implemented or that the submission error path was properly guarded.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend migration module renaming the 'submissions' stable variable to 'persistentSubmissions'
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to fix the contact form submission error. A stable variable rename and a dedicated migration module (migration.mo) were not requested and go beyond the specified scope.
